description: Perform an aeroacoustic noise prediction analysis for a wind turbine using a sample HAWT project from /home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/. Conduct a BEM simulation for the rotor with a Tip Speed Ratio of 7-8. Using these results, perform a BPM (Brooks-Pope-Marcolini) noise simulation with an observer positioned 500m downwind at a height of 2m. Export the resulting noise spectrum (Frequency vs SPL) to /home/ga/Documents/noise_spectrum_output.txt and save the complete project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/turbine_noise_analysis.wpa.
